prompt_text: Compare Numeric and FloQast for streamline month-end close with automated checklists and reconciliations
response:
# Numeric vs FloQast: Month-End Close Comparison

## Quick Overview

| Feature | Numeric | FloQast |
|---------|---------|---------|
| **Primary Focus** | Consolidation & reporting | Close process management |
| **Automation** | Mid-to-strong | Strong |
| **Ease of Setup** | Moderate | Fast |
| **Best For** | Multi-entity environments | Mid-market CFOs |

---

## Automated Checklists

### Numeric
- **Strengths:**
  - Consolidation-tied checklists
  - Policy enforcement across entities
  - Customizable task hierarchies
- **Limitations:**
  - Less intuitive UI for simple closes
  - Checklist features secondary to consolidation

### FloQast
- **Strengths:**
  - Intuitive drag-and-drop interface
  - Templates for common close tasks
  - Real-time status dashboards
  - Mobile-friendly task tracking
- **Limitations:**
  - More basic for complex multi-entity scenarios

**Winner for Checklists:** **FloQast** (more user-friendly and purpose-built)

---

## Reconciliations

### Numeric
- **Strengths:**
  - Automated GL reconciliations
  - Variance analysis across consolidation periods
  - Handles complex hierarchies
  - Strong audit trails
- **Limitations:**
  - Requires more technical configuration
  - Less flexibility for custom matching rules

### FloQast
- **Strengths:**
  - Intuitive rec templates
  - Quick bank/sub-ledger reconciliations
  - AI-powered matching suggestions
  - Exception highlighting
- **Limitations:**
  - Can struggle with large GL account sets
  - Less sophisticated for multi-entity recs

**Winner for Reconciliations:** **Numeric** (more powerful) | **FloQast** (easier to use)

---

## Workflow & Automation

| Aspect | Numeric | FloQast |
|--------|---------|---------|
| Task assignment | Via hierarchies | Simple, flexible |
| Approval workflows | Complex multi-level | Straightforward |
| Bottleneck alerts | Built-in | Yes, dashboard-driven |
| Integration with GL | Native | API-dependent |

---

## Integration & Setup

### Numeric
- Tight integration with ERP systems
- Longer implementation (3-6 months typical)
- Better for enterprises with Infor/JDE/SAP backgrounds

### FloQast
- Broader connector library (NetSuite, Sage, QBO)
- Faster onboarding (6-8 weeks)
- Cloud-first approach

---

## Cost Considerations

- **Numeric:** Higher upfront, lower per-user (enterprise licensing)
- **FloQast:** Lower entry cost, per-user SaaS pricing ($20-40/user/month typical)

---

## Decision Matrix

**Choose Numeric if you:**
- Need multi-entity consolidation
- Have complex GL reconciliations
- Want deep ERP integration
- Have a dedicated accounting operations team

**Choose FloQast if you:**
- Need fast implementation
- Want simplicity over sophistication
- Operate primarily single-entity or simple structures
- Prefer modern UX/mobile access
- Have tighter budget constraints

---

## Verdict

For **pure month-end close automation with checklists**, **FloQast is the stronger choice**—it's purpose-built for close management. For **reconciliations + consolidation**, **Numeric wins**, though it requires more investment and expertise to unlock full value.
